name: test_create_child_record_from_consent_with_nhs_number[children0]
description:
Test: Create a new child record from an unmatched consent response with NHS number.
Steps:
1. Select a child from unmatched consent responses.
2. Click to create a new record and complete the process.
3. Verify the child is removed from unmatched responses.
4. Go to children page and verify activity log for the created child.
Verification:
- Created alert is visible.
- Consent response for the child is no longer visible in unmatched list.
- Activity log for the child shows the creation event.
descriptionHtml:
Test: Create a new child record from an unmatched consent response with NHS number.
Steps:

  1. Select a child from unmatched consent responses.
  2. Click to create a new record and complete the process.
  3. Verify the child is removed from unmatched responses.
  4. Go to children page and verify activity log for the created child.
    Verification:
  • Created alert is visible.
  • Consent response for the child is no longer visible in unmatched list.
  • Activity log for the child shows the creation event.
statusMessage:
playwright._impl._errors.Error: Locator.is_visible: Error: strict mode violation: get_by_text("Consent response manually matched with child record") resolved to 2 elements: 1)

↵ Consent response manually matched with c…

aka get_by_role("heading", name="Consent response manually").first 2)

↵ Consent response manually matched with c…

aka get_by_role("heading", name="Consent response manually").nth(1) Call log: - checking visibility of get_by_text("Consent response manually matched with child record")
statusTrace:
children = {: [Child(first_name='ALISE', last_name='HADLEIGH', nhs_number='9449303797', address=('1 LOWER G...xample.org'), Parent(full_name='Maureen Skinner-Blackburn', relationship='Mum', email_address='qblack@example.com')))]} children_page = consent_response_page = create_new_record_consent_response_page = dashboard_page = schools = {'HPV': [School(name='The Oxford Academy', urn='148354', site=None), School(name='Towers School and Sixth Form Centre'...The Tavistock Children's Day Unit", urn='135167', site=None), School(name='Oakwood Academy', urn='138130', site=None)]} unmatched_consent_responses_page = @pytest.mark.parametrize( "children", [ { Programme.HPV: [ Child( patient.given_name, patient.family_name, patient.nhs_number, patient.address, patient.date_of_birth, 9, (Parent.get(Relationship.DAD), Parent.get(Relationship.MUM)), ) ] } ], ) def test_create_child_record_from_consent_with_nhs_number( children, children_page, consent_response_page, create_new_record_consent_response_page, dashboard_page, schools, unmatched_consent_responses_page, ): """ Test: Create a new child record from an unmatched consent response with NHS number. Steps: 1. Select a child from unmatched consent responses. 2. Click to create a new record and complete the process. 3. Verify the child is removed from unmatched responses. 4. Go to children page and verify activity log for the created child. Verification: - Created alert is visible. - Consent response for the child is no longer visible in unmatched list. - Activity log for the child shows the creation event. """ child = children[Programme.HPV][0] school = schools[Programme.HPV][0] unmatched_consent_responses_page.click_child(child) consent_response_page.click_create_new_record() create_new_record_consent_response_page.create_new_record() expect(unmatched_consent_responses_page.created_alert).to_be_visible() unmatched_consent_responses_page.check_response_for_child_not_visible(child) dashboard_page.click_mavis() dashboard_page.click_children() > children_page.verify_activity_log_for_created_or_matched_child(child, school) tests/test_consent_responses.py:174: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ mavis/test/pages/children.py:221: in verify_activity_log_for_created_or_matched_child self.check_log_updates_with_match() mavis/test/pages/children.py:181: in check_log_updates_with_match reload_until_element_is_visible( mavis/test/wrappers.py:103: in reload_until_element_is_visible if tag.is_visible(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ return await self._channel.send( .venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:69: in send return await self._connection.wrap_api_call( _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ testStage.description:
Test: Create a new child record from an unmatched consent response with NHS number.
Steps:
1. Select a child from unmatched consent responses.
2. Click to create a new record and complete the process.
3. Verify the child is removed from unmatched responses.
4. Go to children page and verify activity log for the created child.
Verification:
- Created alert is visible.
- Consent response for the child is no longer visible in unmatched list.
- Activity log for the child shows the creation event.
